title: genista cuspidata
intro: Genista cuspidata, also known as Needle Spurry or Needle Bush, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia, known for its small yellow flowers and needle-like leaves. The medicinal properties of Genista cuspidata include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Genista cuspidata has been used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system.
